TopLevelControl.name: FarmingPartyPlusWindow
TopLevelControl.OnUpdate: local w, h = self:GetDimensions() if ((self.currentWidth ~= w) or (self.currentHeight ~= h)) then self.currentWidth = w self.currentHeight = h if(self.onResize) then self.onResize() end end
TopLevelControl.OnMoveStart: if FarmingPartyPlus.Settings ~= nil then FarmingPartyPlus.Settings:MoveStart() end
TopLevelControl.OnMoveStop: if FarmingPartyPlus.Settings ~= nil then FarmingPartyPlus.Settings:MoveStop() end
